title: Dispersive continuation with explicitly tracked truncation error
gist: Reconstruct the target quantity in an adjacent kinematic-like region through a dispersive continuation whose truncation error is tracked explicitly, so the continuation comes with an uncertainty band instead of a point estimate.

claims.claim: The target quantity admits a dispersive representation whose truncation error can be bounded by the tail's asymptotic behavior.
A toy reconstruction recovers the reference curve within the stated uncertainty band across the continuation region.
Analytic-structure constraints remove most of the ambiguity that affects unconstrained extrapolation.

note: Synthetic example card for tests and protocol demonstrations. The references are placeholders, not real publications or real computations.
